title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, deployed via Virgo Network for high-throughput serving. The video compares these ASICs against NVIDIA GPUs and analyzes how scaling strategies affect the economics of training and serving LLMs at scale.
